name: ticktick
title: TickTick
description: Manage your TickTick tasks from Raycast — list, create, quick-add, and view upcoming tasks.
author: jkrumm

commands.name: my-tasks
commands.title: Tasks
commands.description: Aufgaben anzeigen und verwalten, gruppiert nach Fälligkeitsdatum

commands.name: menu-bar
commands.title: TickTick
commands.description: Überfällige und heutige Aufgaben in der Menüleiste anzeigen

scripts.prepublishOnly:
echo "

It seems like you are trying to publish the Raycast extension to npm.

If you did intend to publish it to npm, remove the \`prepublishOnly\` script and rerun \`npm publish\` again.
If you wanted to publish it to the Raycast Store instead, use \`npm run publish\` instead.

" && exit 1

preferences.name: apiToken
preferences.title: API Token
preferences.description: Bearer token for the argo TickTick proxy at argo.jkrumm.com/api

preferences.name: baseUrl
preferences.title: API Base URL
preferences.description: argo proxy base URL (incl. /api path prefix)

preferences.name: defaultProjectId
preferences.title: Default Project ID
preferences.description: Project used when Quick Add cannot match a project (optional)
